_meta.name: English

Join the waiting list for early access t: Create your SIMY account on the web, choose a plan, and complete subscription checkout securely with Stripe.
Only 500 beta spots remaining: Plans and billing are managed on the web
No credit card required: Workspace setup starts immediately after checkout
Priority onboarding support: Connect calendar, meetings, and notifications after checkout
Exclusive beta features: Use the iPhone app only when recording support is needed
Start your journey with SIMY today: Start SIMY on the web today
Join thousands of forward-thinking teams: SIMY is a web-contracted SaaS. The app is a recording companion for teams that need it.
人が足りない。仕事は増える。SIMYが動く。: There aren't enough people. Work will increase. SIMY moves.
退職、異動、採用凍結、兼務。人は増えないのに、会議運営、進捗確認、緊急対応、月次: Retirement, transfer, hiring freeze, concurrent position. Even though the number of people will not increase, the burden of meeting management, progress confirmation, emergency response, monthly reporting, OJT, and procedure manual creation will be placed on specific people. Twin handles the management work before it is handed over to humans, and returns only the final decision to the humans.
会議で決まった担当・期限・連絡文・報告材料を、放置される前にそろえる。: Prepare the responsibilities, deadlines, correspondence, and report materials decided at the meeting before they are left unattended.
決定事項を担当と期限に変え、関係者への共有文まで用意する。: Change the decisions to responsibilities and deadlines, and even prepare a shared message for the parties involved.
緊急メール、OJT、月次報告、手順書を、詳しい人ひとりに抱えさせない。: Don't leave emergency emails, OJT, monthly reports, and procedure manuals to just one person who is familiar with them.
人が足りない。仕事は増える。: There aren't enough people. Work will increase.
退職者・異動者の穴埋め、兼務、採用凍結で、会議、管理、教育、報告、緊急対応は特定: Meetings, management, training, reporting, and emergency response will be concentrated on specific people by filling in gaps for retirees and transfers, holding additional positions, and freezing hiring. Twin moves forward with administrative work to keep the department running, and takes it out of the hands of those who can.
週次ミーティング、部門取りまとめ、チーム進捗確認、部下/同僚への指示を止めません: Never stop holding weekly meetings, organizing departments, checking team progress, and giving instructions to subordinates/colleagues.
予算管理、長期計画、優先順位づけ、採用しない前提での調整を、判断できる材料にしま: We will use budget management, long-term planning, prioritization, and adjustments on the assumption that it will not be adopted as materials that will help you make decisions.
e-mailによるクレーム対応、緊急案件、顧客からの直接連絡を、返信案まで進めま: We will respond to complaints, urgent matters, and direct communications from customers via e-mail, and proceed with reply proposals.
新人説明、OJT、質問対応、チーム内共有、失敗時のフォローを属人化させません。: We do not make explanations for new employees, OJT, answering questions, sharing within the team, and follow-up in case of failure to be individualized.
スクショ付き手順書、業務マニュアル、FAQ、引き継ぎ資料を、作成待ちで止めません: Procedure manuals with screenshots, business manuals, FAQs, and handover materials will not be stopped waiting for creation.
CEO向け週次レポート、CFO向け月次レポート、部門横断会議、タスク割当を下書き: Draft weekly reports for the CEO, monthly reports for the CFO, cross-functional meetings, and task assignments.
現場で、いくつ起きていますか。: How many are happening in the field?
これは架空の悩みではありません。上司の退職、異動、レイオフ、採用凍結のあと、「詳: This is not a hypothetical problem. This is what actually happens to those who know, those who can, and those who remain after their boss retires, is transferred, is laid off, or has a hiring freeze.
上位職の仕事だけ増える。: Only jobs for higher-ranking positions will increase.
判断と善意に依存していく。: It depends on judgment and good intentions.
辞めたマネージャーの週次会議、エスカレーション、新人オンボーディングが、そのまま: The departed manager's weekly meetings, escalations, and new employee onboarding came as they were.
肩書きも給与も変わらないまま、「当面お願い」で管理職の仕事だけが増えている。: Job titles and salaries have remained the same, but only managerial work has increased as a ``request for the time being''.
会議、予算、長期計画の“主担当”になっている: Responsible for meetings, budgets, and long-term planning
後任は採られず、その状態が「効率的」「横串で見られている」と見なされている。: No successor has been appointed, and his current situation is seen as being ``efficient'' and ``viewed sideways.''
優先順位もバックアップもないまま、緊急対応と火消しが続いている: Emergency response and firefighting continues without prioritization or backup.
何を後回しにしていいか誰も決めず、休むこと自体がリスクになる。: No one decides what to put off, and taking time off itself becomes a risk.
「とりあえず窓口」「PMO」「取りまとめ」が増えている: The number of "temporary contact points", "PMO", and "coordination" is increasing.
正式な権限はないのに、部門間調整、締切確認、タスク整理だけは自分に来る。: Even though I have no formal authority, I am responsible for coordinating between departments, confirming deadlines, and organizing tasks.
CEO向け週次レポート、CFO向け月次レポート、進捗報告まで書いている: I write weekly reports for the CEO, monthly reports for the CFO, and even progress reports.
会議に出て、数字を集め、リスクをまとめ、最後は資料化まで自分。: I go to meetings, collect numbers, summarize risks, and in the end, I do all the documentation myself.
通常業務の横で、新人教育、OJT、チーム研修まで回している: In addition to regular work, I also handle training for new employees, on-the-job training, and team training.
聞かれるのは毎回同じこと。でも「詳しい人」が自分しかいない。: I get asked the same thing every time. But I'm the only person who knows anything about it.
スクショ付き手順書、業務マニュアル、FAQ、引き継ぎ資料まで作っている: We even create procedure manuals with screenshots, business manuals, FAQs, and handover materials.
システム導入や業務改善のはずが、いつの間にか現場の追加業務になっている。: What was supposed to be system introduction and business improvement suddenly turned into additional work at the site.
休み明けに、未返信メール、確認依頼、報告作成が山になっている: After the holidays, there is a pile of unanswered emails, confirmation requests, and report creation.
自分が止まると仕事も止まる。だから結局、夜や休日に先回りしてしまう。: When I stop, my work also stops. So in the end, I end up getting ahead of myself on nights and holidays.
3つ以上当てはまるなら、問題は個人の生産性ではありません。: If three or more apply to you, the problem is not your personal productivity.
仕事が、特定の人に流れ込む構造です。Twinは、その管理業務を人に積まれる前に動: A structure in which work flows to specific people. Twin handles administrative work before it is handed over to humans, and returns only the parts that require judgment to humans.
次の行動まで導く。: Guide you to your next action.
SIMYは、分散した情報・人・企業・会議・案件を読み解き、目的達成や受注につなが: SIMY deciphers dispersed information, people, companies, meetings, and projects and converts it into actions that lead to goal achievement and orders.
バラバラの情報・人・企業・会議・案件を一つの文脈にまとめ、受注や目的達成につなが: It brings together disparate information, people, companies, meetings, and projects into a single context and transforms them into the next action that leads to receiving orders and achieving goals.
外部状況と各プロジェクトの目的・納期から、いますぐ動くべきことと会議で絞る論点を: Based on the external situation and the purpose and delivery date of each project, we clarify what needs to be done immediately and the points to be discussed at the meeting.
独自プロンプトにより、広いアクション空間から成果に近い候補を絞り込み、実行しやす: Unique prompts narrow down candidates from a wide action space that are close to results, making them easy to implement.
人に積まれる前に、Twinが動き出す。: Twin starts moving before it is loaded with people.
Twinは、会議で決まった担当・期限、e-mail返信案、月次報告の材料、手順書: Twin prepares the responsibilities and deadlines decided at the meeting, e-mail reply proposals, monthly report materials, drafts of procedure manuals, and next follow-up in advance. Instead of starting from scratch, people can start by checking and making decisions.
人に積まれる前にTwinが動く: Twin moves before being loaded onto someone
会議が終わると担当・期限・共有文が出る: When the meeting is over, the person in charge, deadline, and a shared statement will appear.
報告、返信、資料、手順書が下書きになる: Reports, replies, materials, and procedure manuals become drafts.
今日やるべき高付加価値Actionに集中する: Concentrate on high value-added actions that need to be taken today
部門の優先順位を確認し、最終判断する: Check departmental priorities and make final decisions
人: 判断、承認、関係者への説明: People: Judgment, approval, explanation to stakeholders
未返信メールを特定し、e-mail返信案を作る: Identify unreplyed emails and create email reply suggestions
月次レポート用に進捗・KPI・リスクをまとめる: Summarize progress, KPIs, and risks for monthly reports
Twin: 材料収集、構成案、ドラフト作成: Twin: Material collection, composition plan, draft creation
会議が終わると、担当・期限・共有文が出る: When the meeting is over, the person in charge, deadline, and shared message will appear.
決まったことを担当と期限に変える: Change fixed things to responsibilities and deadlines
次の連絡、報告、資料作成を一覧にする: List the following communications, reports, and document creation
会議・メール・資料から担当と期限を出す: Indicate responsibilities and deadlines from meetings, emails, and materials
返信、報告、手順書の材料を集める: Gather materials for replies, reports, and procedure manuals
送信・共有前に人の確認を挟む: Ask someone to confirm before sending/sharing
今日中に判断すべき仕事が、先に見えるようになった。: I can now see tasks that should be decided by the end of the day ahead of time.
退職者の穴埋め、兼務、採用凍結で仕事が増えるほど、今日決めるべきことと、明日以降: The more work you have to do due to filling in the gaps of retired employees, taking on additional positions, and freezing hiring, the more decisions you need to make today and the preparations you need to make tomorrow.
利用後は、今日中に見るべき判断、承認、関係者説明が先に並び、調査や下書きはTwi: After using it, the decisions, approvals, and explanations to stakeholders that need to be seen today are lined up first, and investigations and drafts can now proceed on the Twin side.
判断、承認、顧客説明など、今日中に止められない仕事が前に出ました。: Work that cannot be stopped today, such as judgment, approval, and customer explanations, has come before me.
明日以降でよい整理、下書き、資料化は後ろに回りました。: Organizing, drafting, and documenting everything after tomorrow has been put on the back burner.
売上、顧客、採用、リスクに効く仕事が見分けやすくなりました。: It's now easier to identify jobs that are effective for sales, customers, recruitment, and risk.
材料集め、分類、下書きは人に積まれる前に進みました。: Materials were collected, sorted, and drafted before being loaded onto people.
できる人は、探す・並べる・下書きする時間を減らし、判断に戻れました。: Those who were able to do so were able to reduce the time spent searching, arranging, and drafting, and return to making decisions.
会議で決まったことが、担当・期限・共有文までそろった。: What was decided at the meeting was all set, including the person in charge, deadline, and shared text.
週次会議や部門横断会議が増えるほど、誰がいつまでにやるか、誰へ共有するかが会議後: As the number of weekly meetings and cross-departmental meetings increases, there is a tendency to worry about who will do it by when and who will share it with after the meeting.
利用後は、決定事項が担当者、期限、次の確認、共有文に分かれ、会議後に人の記憶だけ: After using it, decisions are divided into the person in charge, deadline, next confirmation, and shared text, and I no longer have to keep up with people's memories after meetings.
決まったことごとに、誰が動くかを確認できました。: I was able to see who would move for each fixed task.
次回会議まで、今日中、今週中などの期限が見えました。: I could see deadlines such as today, this week, etc. until the next meeting.
関係者に送る議事メモと確認依頼が下書きになりました。: The meeting memo and confirmation request to be sent to the relevant parties have been drafted.
次の会議で確認する論点まで残りました。: There are still issues to be discussed at the next meeting.
会議後に「誰がやるんだっけ」を思い出す時間が減りました。: After a meeting, I spend less time remembering who is going to do it.
月次報告や改善依頼の進め方が、最初から見えるようになった。: You can now see from the beginning how to proceed with monthly reports and improvement requests.
「月次報告を作って」「業務改善を進めて」「手順書を用意して」と言われても、材料、: Even if you are told to ``create a monthly report,'' ``promote business improvements,'' or ``prepare a procedure manual,'' the materials, order, and reviewers tend to be unclear.
利用後は、必要な材料、作る順番、確認すべき人、最後に出す成果物まで見えてから着手: After using it, I was able to see the materials needed, the order in which they should be made, the people who should confirm them, and the final product before I started.
進捗、KPI、リスク、過去資料など、先に集めるものが見えました。: I could see what I needed to collect first, such as progress, KPIs, risks, and past materials.
調査、整理、下書き、確認、提出の順に並びました。: The order was research, organize, draft, confirm, and submit.
誰にどこで確認を挟むかが決まりました。: It has been decided who will check and where.
報告、手順書、共有文まで出口がはっきりしました。: The exit is now clear for reports, procedure manuals, and shared messages.
「何から始めるか」を考える前に、必要な段取りが見えました。: Before thinking about where to start, I could see the necessary steps.
次に連絡すべき相手と、送るe-mail文面が用意された。: Next, the person to contact and the e-mail text to send were prepared.
顧客、社内関係者、候補者、引き継ぎ相手への連絡は、忙しい人ほど後回しになります。: Busy people tend to put off contacting customers, internal stakeholders, candidates, and handover partners.
利用後は、誰に、なぜ、何を送るかが整理され、e-mail下書きを見て直すところか: After using it, I was able to organize what to send, to whom, and why, and I was able to start by reviewing and revising my e-mail drafts.
今日連絡しないと止まる相手が分かりました。: I found out who will stop if I don't contact them today.
展示会、会議、未返信、クレームなど、送る理由が残りました。: Reasons for sending remained, such as exhibitions, conferences, unanswered messages, and complaints.
Gmailに入れる前のe-mail文面が下書きになりました。: The e-mail text before being added to Gmail is now a draft.
Gmail下書きなど、次の行動に渡せました。: I was able to pass it on to the next action, such as a Gmail draft.
顧客フォローや緊急メールを、思い出して書き始める必要が減りました。: There is no need to remember and start writing customer follow-up or urgent emails.
返信、報告、資料を、白紙から作らなくてよくなった。: Replies, reports, and materials no longer need to be created from scratch.
週次報告、月次レポート、返信、要約、PPT、議事録、調査メモは、作るだけで時間を: Weekly reports, monthly reports, replies, summaries, PPTs, meeting minutes, and research memos take up your time just by creating them.
利用後は、会議メモ、メール、進捗情報から下書きができ、ゼロから文章や資料構成を考: After using it, I was able to create drafts from meeting notes, emails, and progress information, reducing the amount of time I spent thinking about writing and document structure from scratch.
未返信メールやフォロー文が下書きになりました。: Unreplyed emails and follow messages are now drafts.
進捗、KPI、リスク、次の打ち手がまとまりました。: Progress, KPIs, risks, and next steps are summarized.
構成やスライド案から確認できました。: I was able to confirm it from the structure and slide plan.
確認済み・作成中・更新日時を追えました。: I was able to track confirmed, under creation, and updated dates.
CEO向け週次、CFO向け月次、顧客返信を、材料集めから抱えなくてよくなりました: You no longer have to collect materials for weekly CEO, monthly CFO, and customer responses.
過去の会議や連絡から、次に確認すべきことが分かった。: From past meetings and communications, I learned what I should check next.
兼務が増えると、過去の会議、関係者、前回の判断、止まっている連絡を思い出すだけで: When you have more concurrent duties, it takes time to remember past meetings, people involved, previous decisions, and any communication that has stopped.
利用後は、前回会議の決定、未返信、関係者、資料の履歴から、今日確認すべきことを見: After using it, you can now see what you need to check today from the history of decisions from previous meetings, unanswered messages, people involved, and materials.
会議、メール、関係者をまたいで振り返れました。: I was able to reflect on the meetings, emails, and people involved.
気になることをそのまま聞けました。: I was able to hear exactly what I was interested in.
次に見ること、誰に確認することが分かりました。: I now know what to look at and who to check with next.
必要なら、そのままe-mailや共有文につながりました。: If necessary, you could easily connect to e-mail or share messages.
「前回どうなったっけ」を探す時間が減りました。: I've spent less time searching for "what happened last time."
週次会議、月次報告、未返信チェックの抜け漏れが減った。: Reduced omissions in weekly meetings, monthly reports, and unreply checks.
週次報告、月次レポート、定例確認、未返信チェックは、毎回人が思い出して動くほど抜: Weekly reports, monthly reports, regular confirmations, and non-reply checks are so often overlooked that people have to remember them every time.
利用後は、毎週・毎月の確認が予定に合わせて出てきて、報告や共有文の下書きまでつな: After using it, weekly and monthly confirmations will appear according to your schedule, and you can even draft reports and shared messages.
前回からの進捗と未確認事項が出ました。: Progress from last time and unconfirmed matters have been revealed.
KPI、リスク、次の打ち手がまとまりました。: KPIs, risks, and next steps have been compiled.
放置しているe-mailを拾えました。: I was able to pick up an e-mail that I had left behind.
上司や関係者に送る文章が準備されました。: I have prepared a text to send to my superiors and related parties.
毎週・毎月の管理業務を、思い出した人だけが抱える状態から外せました。: Weekly and monthly management tasks are no longer the responsibility of only those who remember them.
会社は、Twinが進める範囲と人が確認する範囲を分けられた。: The company was able to separate the scope that Twin would proceed with and the scope that would be checked by humans.
会社が買うには、AIが勝手に送信・共有しないこと、どこで人が確認するかが見えるこ: For a company to buy, it is necessary that the AI does not send or share information without permission, and that it can be seen where people check it.
利用後は、送信、共有、外部連携の前に人の確認を挟みながら、管理業務の下準備をTw: After using it, you can now rely on Twin to do the preliminary preparations for administrative work, including human confirmation before sending, sharing, and linking with external parties.
重要な外部連携前に確認を挟めました。: We were able to confirm this before making important external collaborations.
ユーザーと管理者の視点を切り替えられました。: You can switch between user and administrator perspectives.
下書き中、確認待ち、実行中が見えました。: I could see it was drafting, waiting for confirmation, and running.
書き込みや送信前に制御できました。: You can control it before writing or sending.
会社が制御しながら、現場の管理業務を軽くできました。: We were able to lighten the on-site management work while still being in control of the company.
材料集め、整理、下書きを、毎回人が抱えなくてよくなった。: People no longer have to collect materials, organize them, and write drafts every time.
人が足りないとき、材料集め、分類、下書き、資料化まで人のキューに置くと、できる人: When you don't have enough people, if you put everyone in a queue to collect materials, sort them, draft them, and document them, you'll get stuck from the people who can do it.
利用後は、返信や報告に必要な材料集め、整理、下書きが先に進み、人は確認と判断に時: After using the system, people can proceed with gathering, organizing, and drafting the materials necessary for replies and reports, allowing them to spend more time reviewing and making decisions.
必要情報が集まりました。: We have gathered the necessary information.
仕事や候補が整理されました。: Jobs and candidates are now organized.
メール、報告、資料案が作られました。: Emails, reports, and draft materials were created.
進行中の仕事が見えるようになりました。: Work in progress is now visible.
判断の前に、必要な材料がそろっている状態を作れました。: I was able to make sure I had all the necessary materials before making a decision.
属人的に積まれていた管理業務を、チームで追える状態にできた。: The administrative work that had been carried out by individual employees was now able to be carried out as a team.
退職、異動、採用凍結、兼務が続くと、仕事は人に積まれ、組織の実行速度と品質が落ち: If employees continue to retire, transfer, freeze hiring, or hold multiple jobs, work will be piled on top of other people, and the speed and quality of the organization's execution will decline.
利用後は、会議で決まったこと、顧客フォロー、手順書、報告資料が一つずつ見えるよう: After using it, I was able to see what was decided in meetings, customer follow-up, procedure manuals, and report materials one by one, and they no longer remained in one person's head.
次のe-mail文面とフォロー理由が残りました。: The following e-mail text and reason for following are left.
OJTや手順書の材料がチームで見えるようになりました。: OJT and procedure manual materials can now be viewed by the team.
人が足りなくても、会議、報告、フォロー、教育が誰か一人で止まりにくくなりました。: Even if there are not enough people, meetings, reports, follow-up, and education are no longer held up by just one person.
メール、Slack、カレンダー、ドキュメントから、次の担当・期限・返信案が出る: From email, Slack, calendar, and documents, you can see the next person in charge, due date, and suggested replies.
Twinは、成果の90%を生む「上位10%の重要事項」以外をAIが特定し、会議で: Twin uses AI to identify matters other than the "top 10% important matters" that produce 90% of results, and prepares in advance the responsibilities and deadlines determined at meetings, materials for monthly reports, customer follow-up e-mail texts, and drafts of procedure manuals and materials. We humans can only focus on the 10% "discontinuous growth" that AI cannot replace.
小さなチームや1つの業務から始める: Start with a small team or one task
トークン割当、専任サポート、SSO、SLAをカスタム提供。管理ワークフロー、制御: Customized provision of token allocation, dedicated support, SSO, and SLA. For businesses that require administrative workflows, controls, and data boundaries at an organization-wide scale.
Twinは、欠員・兼務・採用凍結で特定の人に積まれる未返信対応、会議後の担当・期: Twin handles unreplyed responses to specific people due to vacancies, concurrent positions, and hiring freezes, organizes responsibilities and deadlines after meetings, monthly reports, customer follow-up, and documents creation before they are piled up.
Twinは、特定の人に積まれる管理業務を、会議後の担当整理、フォロー、報告、資料: Twin moves the management tasks that are assigned to a specific person to the next level, from post-meeting responsibilities to follow-up, reporting, and document creation, and returns only the final decision to the person.
人にしかできない仕事へ: To work that only people can do

Taken verbatim from the SIMY Home page —: Taken verbatim from the SIMY Home page — persona 04 of 9. The Product Manager at a 150-person tech company. No name, just the role and the story.
After every planning session, someone sp: After every planning session, someone spends hours turning discussion into a structured roadmap. Decisions get lost. Owners get fuzzy. The doc lands in Notion by Thursday.
SIMY generates a structured roadmap, ass: SIMY generates a structured roadmap, assigns owners, and sends summaries automatically. Every decision is captured the moment it's made — no cleanup required.
Her squads show up to standup with a sha: Her squads show up to standup with a shared, written plan — not a half-remembered meeting. Mondays are now about questions, not note-taking.
A single unbroken take through the real: A single unbroken take through the real SIMY desktop app. Four scenes — Meeting, Actions, Dashboard, Twin — with the cursor moving the way she moves it. No edits, no fake UI.
\"Hi Tetsuo.\" — the Twin opens with a s: "Hi Tetsuo." — the Twin opens with a suggested question.
Scene 01. Morning check-in with the Digi: Scene 01. Morning check-in with the Digital Twin. It already knows what's due today.
Q2 Strategy meeting ends — every \"Must: Q2 Strategy meeting ends — every "Must Decide" captured.
Scene 02. AI briefing, open issues, and: Scene 02. AI briefing, open issues, and owner assignments — no manual notes.
A PR is already drafted: \"Update homepa: A PR is already drafted: "Update homepage design to a whiter aesthetic."
Scene 03. My Actions turns the decision: Scene 03. My Actions turns the decision into a ready-to-review ticket.
Scene 04. The outcome lands on her dashb: Scene 04. The outcome lands on her dashboard — roadmap ready before standup.

SIMY handles meeting management, reporting, emergency response, and procedure manual creation that are assigned to a specific person due to vacancies, concurrent positions, or hiring freezes, before they are assigned to a specific person.
SIMYは欠員・兼務・採用凍結で特定の人に積まれる会議運営、報告、緊急対応、手順: SIMY handles meeting management, reporting, emergency response, and procedure manual creation that are assigned to a specific person due to vacancies, concurrent positions, or hiring freezes, before they are assigned to a specific person.
Agenda, decisions, owners, and follow-up: Agenda, decisions, owners, and follow-ups are ready.
Budget, resources, urgency, and trade-of: Budget, resources, urgency, and trade-offs are being sorted.
Context, impact, tone, and next message: Context, impact, tone, and next message are prepared.
Procedure, examples, exceptions, and FAQ: Procedure, examples, exceptions, and FAQs are structured.
Progress, risks, KPIs, and next moves ar: Progress, risks, KPIs, and next moves are being drafted.
Who is affected, who decides, and who re: Who is affected, who decides, and who responds are clear.
Today’s time-sensitive work is separated: Today’s time-sensitive work is separated from the backlog.
